file_insights.changes: Updated all_providers() function to register CodexProvider and GeminiProvider alongside existing ClaudeProvider
file_insights.impact: Provider registry now supports multiple LLM backends; clients can enumerate all available providers
file_insights.complexity: Low - straightforward vector extension with consistent instantiation pattern

patterns_discovered.description: Providers implement the Provider trait, instantiated with ::new(), boxed into Vec<Box<dyn Provider>>
Registry uses multi-line list format with trailing comma for maintainability
patterns_discovered.evidence: Each provider on separate line with consistent indentation

patterns_discovered.description: Each provider lives in its own module (claude, codex, gemini) and registered centrally
patterns_discovered.evidence: Module declarations and centralized all_providers() function
